typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	FileExists as boolean (),
	FileNameArchiveMFA as string (),
	FileNameArchiveOWA as string (),
	FileNameExceptionReport as string (),
	FileNameMFA as string (),
	FileNameOWA as string (),
	PackageExecutionID as integer (),
	RowsDeleted as integer (),
	RowsDiscarded as integer (),
	RowsInserted as integer (),
	RowsNotWrittenError as integer (),
	RowsReadError as integer (),
	RowsReadNoError as integer (),
	RowsUpdated as integer (),
	EmailDistribution as string (),
	EmailProfileName as string (),
	MFAFileName as string (),
	OWAFileName as string (),
	ParentPackageExecutionID as integer ()
}

source(output(
		DisplayName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> ReadfromMFAfile	source(output(
		DisplayName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> ReadfromOWAfile
ReadfromMFAfile sort(asc(DisplayName, false)) ~> SortMFADisplayName
ReadfromOWAfile sort(asc(DisplayName, false)) ~> SortOWADisplayName
SortOWADisplayName,SortMFADisplayName join(ReadfromOWAfile@DisplayName == ReadfromMFAfile@DisplayName,
	joinType:'inner',
	broadcast: 'none')~> MergeJoinOWAMFADisplayName
MergeJoinOWAMFADisplayName select(mapColumn(
		{} = ReadfromMFAfile@{}
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> MergeJoinOWAMFADisplayNameSelect
MergeJoinOWAMFADisplayNameSelect derive(DisplayName = DisplayName) ~> MergeJoinOWAMFADisplayNameREFORMAT1
MergeJoinOWAMFADisplayNameREFORMAT1 sink(input(
		DisplayName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		DisplayName)) ~> WritetoExceptionReport
